message:
Fix detail pane scroll overshooting past last full page

The detail scroll position could exceed the valid range (total_lines -
visible_height), causing blank space at the bottom of the detail pane.
This happened across several code paths: find navigation auto-scroll,
message jump navigation, pending scroll-to on tick, and the render
clamp itself (which used saturating_sub(1) instead of
saturating_sub(visible_height)).

Introduce max_detail_scroll() and set_detail_scroll_clamped() helpers
that compute and enforce the correct upper bound, then apply them at
every scroll mutation site:

- DetailFindNavigated auto-scroll
- DetailMessageJumped (also clamp current position before searching)
- DetailSessionHitNavigated
- Tick pending-scroll and existing-scroll normalization
- Render-time effective_scroll clamp

Add five tests covering the new clamping behavior: find navigation,
tick with pending target, tick without pending target, message jump
from oversized state, and render-time clamp equivalence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
